data.name: GradientSkiaTextBrushRelativePoint_RelativeCoordinateMustBeInRange
data.value: When RelativeUnit is Relative, the coordinate must be in the range [0, 1].

data.name: RenderManagerExtension_CharDataMustBelongToCurrentLine
data.value: The provided CharData does not belong to the current LineDrawingArgument and cannot be used to get handwriting paper information.

data.name: RenderManagerExtension_MustSpecifyCharDataWhenMultipleRunPropertiesExist
data.value: When a line contains multiple run properties, CharData must be specified to indicate which run property should be used.

data.name: SkiaCharInfoMeasurer_CurrentCharSizeMustBeAvailableAfterMeasure
data.value: The current character size must be available after measurement.

data.name: SkiaTextEditor_DebugReRenderOnlyAvailableInDebugMode
data.value: The method {0} can only be called in debug mode.

data.name: SkiaTextEditor_PlatformProviderAlreadyBoundToTextEditor
data.value: Each SkiaTextEditorPlatformProvider can only be associated with one SkiaTextEditor and must not be reused across editors. The provided platform provider is already bound to an editor whose DebugName is {0}.
